title: EUR/USD
text: Eurozone inflation jumps to 2.6%, driving EUR/USD above 1.1780; ECB rate decision implications.

title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 159.00 resistance, BoJ intervention risk rising as pair approaches 160.00.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding above 0.7160, RBA hiking rates supports AUD carry; AUD/USD consolidating.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 18.1 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +0.80%.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3%, institutional divergence from retail short bias.
